meanings.definition: process or result of becoming less or smaller
examples: the material lost 2 inches per yard in shrinkage

meanings.definition: wither, as with a loss of moisture
draw back, as with fear or pain
examples: she flinched when they showed the slaughtering of the calf
Hot water will shrink the sweater

meanings.definition: decrease in size, range, or extent
examples: My courage shrivelled when I saw the task before me
